name: EobMasterDelivryUpdt

text.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[File1_TMP_EobMasterDelivryUpdt]), cte2 AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[File2_TMP_EobMasterDelivryUpdt]), cte3 AS (SELECT cte1.*, cte2.CDOCID AS CDOCID_1 FROM cte1 LEFT JOIN cte2 ON cte1.CDOCID = cte2.CDOCID), cte4 AS (SELECT cte3.CRCRDTYP, cte3.CRCRDVRSN, cte3.CDOCID, cte3.CNM, cte3.CNM2, cte3.CADDR1, cte3.CADDR2, cte3.CADDR3, cte3.CADDR4, cte3.CCITY, cte3.CST, cte3.CZIP, cte3.CALTCONSOLIDATIONKEY, cte3.CALTEPISODICMERGEKEY, cte3.CSORTKEY, cte3.CINTLCITYORTOWN, cte3.CINTLPROVNCEORTERR, cte3.CINTLPOSTALCD, cte3.CINTLCTRY, cte3.CEMAILADDR, cte3.CEMAILADDRFORNTFCTN, cte3.CRECPNTCD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte3.CDOCID) = dbo.trim_default(cte3.CDOCID_1) THEN '009' ELSE '008' END AS CDOCTYP, cte3.CCLMTYP, cte3.CRICD, cte3.CDLVRYTYP, cte3.CEARLYDLVRY, cte3.CSATDLVRY, cte3.CSGNTRRQRD, cte3.CHOLDCD, cte3.CCLNTCD, cte3.CTSTFLAG, cte3.CPURGEFLAG, cte3.CPURGERSN, cte3.CRULEEFFDT, cte3.CUSEPRPSD, cte3.COVRIDEDSTRBRULE, cte3.CBILLCD, cte3.COVLAYRPTID, cte3.COVLAYINSTR, cte3.COPENFLD1, cte3.COPENFLD2, cte3.COPENFLD3, cte3.CDOCINDX1, cte3.CDOCINDX2, cte3.CDOCINDX3, cte3.CDOCINDX4, cte3.CCNTNTDESC, cte3.CDONOTCONSOLIDTFLAG, cte3.CISUNCCD, cte3.CORIGFILEFMT, cte3.CTRNSLTNID, cte3.CISPREAUTH, cte3.CISDIRDEP, cte3.CSIMPLEXDUPLEX, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL1, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL2, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL3, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL4, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL5, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL6, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL7, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL8, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL9, cte3.CRPTNGROLLUPVAL10, cte3.CADTNLDUPFILEDETECTIONVAL, cte3.CFORCACOVHEET, cte3.CBININSRTCD1, cte3.CBININSRTCD2, cte3.CBININSRTCD3, cte3.CBININSRTCD4, cte3.CPHNNO, cte3.CMOBLPHNNOFORNTFCTN, cte3.CUSEREDUCEDPDFPG, cte3.CVNDRINSRTPGCT, cte3.CISASMNTEOB, cte3.CEPAYTYP, cte3.CHIN, cte3.CNAICCD, cte3.CVNDRTRANSID, cte3.CVNDRINSRTPGTYP, cte3.CSTMNTDTSTART, cte3.CSTMNTDTEND, cte3.CISEPISODIC, cte3.CCLMSYS, cte3.CBUSSLASTARTDT, cte3.CBUSSLASTARTTM, cte3.CPAYERNM, cte3.CPAYERTIN, cte3.CPAYERID, cte3.CPAYERADDR, cte3.CPAYERCITY, cte3.CPAYERST, cte3.CPAYERZIP, cte3.CPAYERCTRY, cte3.CPAYERTECHCNTCTNM, cte3.CPAYERTECHCNTCTPHN, cte3.CPAYERTECHCNTCTEMAIL, cte3.CCLMSYSVRSN, cte3.CSUPRSERAHARDCOPY, cte3.CSUPLMTDLVRYPRTY, cte3.C835PLBPROVID, cte3.C835PLBFISCALPERDDT, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD1, cte3.C835PLBADJID1, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT1, cte3.C835OPT, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD2, cte3.C835PLBADJID2, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT2, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD3, cte3.C835PLBADJID3, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT3, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD4, cte3.C835PLBADJID4, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT4, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD5, cte3.C835PLBADJID5, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT5, cte3.C835PLBADJRSNCD6, cte3.C835PLBADJID6, cte3.C835PLBADJAMT6, cte3.CCLEVERLTRMATCH, cte3.CPLAINTXCONSOLIDATIONKEY, cte3.CPLAINTXEPISODICMERGEKEY, cte3.CALTST FROM cte3), DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[RES_TMP_EobMasterDelivryUpdt]; SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.[RES_TMP_EobMasterDelivryUpdt] FROM cte4
